---
title: "Wrapping up"
---

:::{.callout-warning}
Under development
:::

| Date | Topic | Reading | Resources |
| -- | -- | -- | -- |
| Tues 12/1  | Explanatory frameworks | Embick & Poeppel (2014) | [Submit questions](https://www.menti.com/bldf9ra1coas) |
| Thurs 12/3 | Researcher panel
| Tues 12/8  |Presentations | 


::: {.callout-tip}
# Learning Goals: Integration
(To be added)
:::
